spec.name: parallel_note_readers
spec.description: Spawn 6 parallel sub-agents, each reading one note file and returning its fact, then aggregate into summary.txt

subagent_tasks.task: Read the file <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/note_0.txt and return its exact content as a single fact string.
Read the file <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/note_1.txt and return its exact content as a single fact string.
Read the file <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/note_2.txt and return its exact content as a single fact string.
Read the file <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/note_3.txt and return its exact content as a single fact string.
Read the file <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/note_4.txt and return its exact content as a single fact string.
Read the file <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/note_5.txt and return its exact content as a single fact string.

spec.aggregation_task: Collect all 6 facts from the sub-agents and write them as a numbered list (Fact 1 through Fact 6) into <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/summary.txt

request.rationale: The objective explicitly states the breadth exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget and the CORRECT move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. 6 notes × 1 read each = 6 parallel sub-agents, then aggregate.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly states the breadth exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget and the CORRECT move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. 6 notes × 1 read each = 6 parallel sub-agents, then aggregate.
